propositions: Integrate task-decomposition SOTA recommendations R1-R7 into the plan-review gate, validating each experimentally via evals before implementation.
Each recommendation ships only behind its own falsifiable eval gate; detection-bearing changes require a passing eval, while R6 ships first with no gate and is validated by dogfooding.
A/B testing (experiment E4) is dropped per operator direction; validation is eval-based and post-ship observation is dogfooding via R7 instrumentation.
E1 must freeze and commit ground-truth outcome and finding-adjudication corpora with inter-rater kappa >= 0.7.
Validated changes land directly in the packaged review process with no config-flag or overlay gating; posture stays a registry property.
A criterion whose trailing blocking-FP proxy exceeds 10% is demoted to advisory via a criteria_routing.json change.
